name: Path Traversal: '/absolute/pathname/here'
description: The product does not properly neutralize Unix-style absolute path sequences ('/absolute/pathname/here') in user-supplied input, allowing attackers to specify arbitrary files on the filesystem.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path starting with '/' that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that rejects absolute paths or enforces the path must be relative to a restricted base directory
